zh.lifeSummary: 當Chevalier Thierry De Chievres Peteghem於大約1049年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫沃特格-比特格姆時，他的父親Hugo Von Peteghem Audenarde20歲，母親wife of hugues27歲。他和Adelindis De Chievres至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1096年享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Chevalier Thierry De Chievres Peteghem于大约1049年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫沃特格-比特格姆时，他的父亲Hugo Von Peteghem Audenarde20岁，母亲wife of hugues27岁。他和Adelindis De Chievres至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1096年享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thierry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Germanic Theodoric, composed of elements meaning ‘people’ and ‘rule’. Compare Terry .

en.lifeSummary: When Chevalier Thierry De Chievres Peteghem was born about 1049, in Wortegem-Petegem, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Hugo Von Peteghem Audenarde, was 20 and his mother, wife of hugues, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Adelindis De Chievres. He died in 1096, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Chevalier Thierry De Chievres Peteghem est né environ 1049, à Wortegem-Petegem, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Hugo Von Peteghem Audenarde, avait 20 ans et sa mère, wife of hugues, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Adelindis De Chievres. Il est décédé en 1096, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Chevalier Thierry De Chievres Peteghem um 1049 in Wortegem-Petegem, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugo Von Peteghem Audenarde 20 und seine Mutter wife of hugues 27. Er hatte mit Adelindis De Chievres mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1096 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Thierry De Chievres Peteghem è nato il circa 1049 nel Wortegem-Petegem, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Hugo Von Peteghem Audenarde, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, wife of hugues, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Adelindis De Chievres. Morì nel 1096, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Chevalier Thierry De Chievres Peteghemが約1049年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンウオルテジェム-ペテジェムで生まれた時，父Hugo Von Peteghem Audenardeは20歳，母wife of huguesは27歳であった。彼はAdelindis De Chievresとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1096年に48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Chevalier Thierry De Chievres Peteghem(이)가 대략 1049년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 워트그-피테그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugo Von Peteghem Audenarde(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 wife of hugues(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Adelindis De Chievres(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1096년 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Thierry De Chievres Peteghem nasceu aproximadamente 1049, em Wortegem-Petegem, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Hugo Von Peteghem Audenarde, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, wife of hugues, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Adelindis De Chievres. Ele faleceu em 1096, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Chevalier Thierry De Chievres Peteghem родился около 1049 г. в местности вортегем-питегем, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Hugo Von Peteghem Audenarde было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали wife of hugues, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Adelindis De Chievres. Он умер в 1096 г. в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Chevalier Thierry De Chievres Peteghem nació aproximadamente 1049, en Wortegem-Petegem, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Hugo Von Peteghem Audenarde, tenía 20 años y su mamá, wife of hugues, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Adelindis De Chievres. Murió en 1096, a la edad de 48 años.
